name: We'll Ring the Bell Waiting for You!!

issues.description: SearchDeck action is incorrect. Effect requires looking at 5 cards from top of deck, revealing up to 2 specific cards (Shandian Warrior type OR Mont Blanc Noland), and adding them to hand. Current DSL uses generic SearchDeck with no filtering logic.

Missing the core mechanic: examine top 5 cards, filter by card type/name (Shandian Warrior OR Mont Blanc Noland), select up to 2, add to hand, then place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order.
Second effect (Trigger + DrawCard) is completely unrelated to card text. Effect has no draw component. This appears to be erroneous DSL.
Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (correct), but action structure does not match effect requirements.

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal a total of up to 2 {Shandian Warrior} type Character cards or [Mont Blanc Noland] and add them to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
